title: HOME DELIVERY - 211info
text: PORTLAND OPEN BIBLE COMMUNITY PANTRY HOME DELIVERY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides delivery of food items, including canned goods, dairy, grains, produce, and meat. Household items such as diapers and wipes, pet supplies, laundry detergent, cleaning supplies, and paper products may be available when supply allows. Preordering is available online in multiple languages, and navigators can assist those who need help with the ordering process. 3223 SE 92nd Avenue Portland, OR 97266 Eligibility: Age 60 and older or age 18 and older with disabilities Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (503) 427-8741 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Message Phone (503) 427-8741 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call the message line and leave full name and contact telephone number. Once set up, individuals can order online. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: Phone: English, interpretation by arrangement Online ordering: English, Spanish, Arabic, Chinese, Russian, Vietnamese AREA SERVED: Multnomah County Services: Cleaning Products Grocery Ordering/Delivery * Disabilities Issues Grocery Ordering/Delivery * Older Adults Laundry Products Personal/Grooming Supplies Pet Food Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - PORTLAND OPEN BIBLE COMMUNITY PANTRY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
